---
title: "Projects"
---

<style>

.project-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 25px;
  margin-top: 40px;
}

.project-card {
  display: block;
  padding: 60px 40px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background-color: #f5f7fa;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: black;
}

</style>

<div class="project-grid">

<a href="projects/isa.qmd" class="project-card">
Internship Skill Analysis
</a>

<a href="projects/missouri.qmd" class="project-card">
Missouri Budget Graph Maker
</a>

<a href="projects/ffdc.qmd" class="project-card">
Fast Food Data Comparison
</a>

<a href="projects/soundtrack_safeguard.qmd" class="project-card">
Soundtrack Safeguard
</a>

</div>
